deterministic.engagement_rationale: 8 signals in the last 14 days from 2 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement at Thornfield AI is high, with 8 signals over the past 14 days, but product activity is concentrated entirely on a single contact, Drew Brown, raising concerns about shallow adoption across the organization. Sentiment is negative: two inbound messages on 2026-05-01 — 'Re: integration setup' and 'Upgrade timeline' — contain formal language stating that 'Meridian Cloud intends to renegotiate the pricing terms' ahead of the next renewal cycle, which is alarming both for the renegotiation posture and the unexplained invocation of 'Meridian Cloud' rather than Thornfield AI. Drew Brown's product usage spans several actions — search (2026-04-27), settings update (2026-04-30), workspace creation (2026-05-02), plan changes (2026-05-03 and 2026-05-08), and report generation (2026-05-05) — with the plan property shifting from free to enterprise, suggesting tier positioning remains unsettled. No signals have been received from any other known contacts, leaving leadership-level intent and broader team sentiment entirely unknown.
